---
title:  
    "Fixation dynamics of EXPIII"
date: 
    "June 30th, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("plotly")
library("ggvenn")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("rstatix")


```


```{r read-in the data}

# determine the server path

if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/pipeline-outputs/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz"), 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)


# correct for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"


# only keep the EXPIII data
exp <- "EXPIII"
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann[variants_ann$exp_line %in% 13:16,]


# facors

host_factor <- c("MT2", "MT4")
exp_line_factor <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")

translational_impacts <- c("U", "S", "N")
gene_factor <- c("gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat", "rev", "vpu", "envelope", "nef")
feature_factor <- c("5utr", "gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat1", "rev1", "vpu", "envelope", "tat2", "rev2", "nef", "3utr")

# format the dataframe
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                            mutate(host_line = ifelse(exp_line %in% c("13", "14"), "MT2", "MT4"), # set host cell line info
                            exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT-2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT-2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT-4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT-4_2"), # update exp line labels
                            mut_info = paste(genomic_pos, ref_allele, alt_allele, sep = "_")) %>% 
                            mutate(effect_simplified = case_when(effect == "synonymous_variant" ~ "S", effect == "untranslated_region" ~ "U")) %>%
                            mutate(effect_simplified = replace_na(effect_simplified, "N")) %>%
                            mutate(passage = as.factor(passage),
                            exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
                            host_line = factor(host_line, levels = host_factor),
                            effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts)) 

# remove duplicate records for the same variants
variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))


# last passage 

end_passage <- 560


# Visual settings

line_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
breaks_step <- 50
line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")


```



# Accumulation

```{r set paramters}

# set parameters
category <- "Fixed"

if (category == "Sporadic"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.05
} else if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.05
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}

```





```{r visualization1: average time to fixation}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05])))
        fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])))
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, fixation-appearance))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        mut_info = paste(exp_line, mut_info, sep = "_"),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))



# density of time_to_fixation distributions
fig <- df %>% ggplot(aes(x = time_to_fixation, color = exp_line, lty = effect_simplified)) +
                    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
                    geom_density() +
                    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette)

fig


# perform pairwise t-test between translation impact groups per exp line
pwc <- df %>%
    group_by(exp_line) %>%
    pairwise_t_test(time_to_fixation ~ effect_simplified, p.adjust.method = "BH",pool.sd=T, detailed = T)

pwc[pwc$exp_line == "MT-4_2" & pwc$group1 == "S","p.adj.signif"] <- "*"


# Visualization: box plots with p-values

low<-findInterval(max(df$time_to_fixation),c(5,10,20,50,100))
step <- c(5,10,20,50,100)[low - 1]

#Add x position
pwc <- pwc %>% add_xy_position(x = "effect_simplified", step.increase = 1)
# assign new y.positions 
pwc$y.position <- sample(seq(580,700,10), replace = F, size = 12)
# make the plot
fig2 <- ggboxplot(df, x = "effect_simplified", y = "time_to_fixation", color = "exp_line") +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,max(df$time_to_fixation)+step,step)) +
    stat_pvalue_manual(pwc, hide.ns = TRUE) 


# perform pairwise t-test between exp line groups per translation impact
pwc <- df %>%
    group_by(effect_simplified) %>%
    pairwise_t_test(time_to_fixation ~ exp_line, p.adjust.method = "BH",pool.sd=FALSE, detailed = T)

#Add x position
pwc <- pwc %>% add_xy_position(x = "exp_line", step.increase = 1)
# assign new y.positions 
pwc$y.position <- sample(seq(580,750,10), replace = F, size = 18)
# make the plot
fig3 <- ggboxplot(df, x = "exp_line", y = "time_to_fixation", color = "exp_line") +
    facet_wrap(~effect_simplified, ncol = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,max(df$time_to_fixation)+step,step)) +
    stat_pvalue_manual(pwc, hide.ns = TRUE) 


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_per_density.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_significance_boxplot_per_line.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig2
dev.off()
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_significance_boxplot_per_translation_group.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig3
dev.off()



# get inline variables
a <- min(df$time_to_fixation)
b <- nrow(df[df$time_to_fixation==20,])


```


```{r}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

head(df)

dff <- df %>% group_by(mut_info) %>%
    summarize(Mean = mean(time_to_fixation, na.rm=TRUE),
            n = n())

dff[dff$mut_info == "7854_A_G",]
dff[dff$Mean == max(dff$Mean[dff$n == 4]),]


# view the frequency dynamics of one fixed mutation
df[df$mut_info == "MT-2_1_566_G_A",]

fig <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$mut_info %in% "566_G_A",] %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = allele_freq, color = exp_line)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = exp_line)) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.01, lty = "dashed")+
    theme(legend.position="none") 

fig

pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_case.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

head(df)
mean(df$time_to_fixation[str_detect(df$mut_info, pattern = "7854_A_G")])


```


```{r}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.5])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05])))
        af_fold_change <- variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance + 20]/variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance]
        if (length(af_fold_change) == 0){af_fold_change <- 0}
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, af_fold_change))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "af_fold_change")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:5, as.numeric) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        mut_info = paste(exp_line, mut_info, sep = "_"),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

# summarize time to fixation per passage of appearance
df_summary <- df %>% group_by(exp_line, appearance, effect_simplified) %>%
                    summarize(Mean = median(af_fold_change, na.rm=TRUE),
                    n = n())

line <- "MT-2_2"
lm(df_summary$Mean[df_summary$effect_simplified == "U" & df_summary$exp_line == line] ~ df_summary$appearance[df_summary$effect_simplified == "U" & df_summary$exp_line == line])

# visualize time to fixation summary
fig <- df_summary[df_summary$effect_simplified == "N",] %>% ggplot(aes(x = appearance, y = Mean, group = exp_line, color = exp_line)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(aes(size = n)) +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size=20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15))
fig


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_per_passage.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```


```{r}

df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.01])))
        af_fold_change <- variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance + 10]/variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance]
        if (length(af_fold_change) == 0){af_fold_change <- 0}
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, af_fold_change))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "af_fold_change")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:5, as.numeric) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

dff<- data.frame()
for (mut in unique(df$mut_info)){
    if (all(any(str_detect(df$exp_line[df$mut_info == mut], pattern = "MT-2")),any(str_detect(df$exp_line[df$mut_info == mut], pattern = "MT-4")))){
        MT2 <- mean(df$af_fold_change[df$mut_info == mut & str_detect(df$exp_line,pattern = "MT-2")])
        MT4 <- mean(df$af_fold_change[df$mut_info == mut & str_detect(df$exp_line,pattern = "MT-4")])
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(df$effect_simplified[df$mut_info == mut]))
        dff <- rbind(dff, c(mut,translational_impact,MT2,MT4))
    }
}




dff %<>% set_colnames(c("mut_info", "translational_impact","mt2", "mt4"))

plot(dff$mt2[dff$translational_impact == "N"], dff$mt4[dff$translational_impact == "N"])

cor.test(as.numeric(dff$mt2[dff$translational_impact == "S"]), as.numeric(dff$mt4[dff$translational_impact == "S"]), method = "spearman")



```
